ops.text:
Plan: /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-05/plans/in-flight-2-cheeky-lake.md (v6). Consumer-API brief: plans/phaseB-consumer-api-brief.md. Goal: one nested Go binary at plugins/codex (module github.com/yasyf/cc-skills/plugins/codex) that is (a) the codex-ask dispatch/registry CLI ported from the deleted 837-line Python, and (b) a self-contained cc-interact consumer whose owner-subagent parks on the `await` MCP tool and is woken on codex completion — defeating harness gap #78782.

PHASE A DONE @ c71589f (pushed main, both CI green incl. new codex CI 50s). The Go port is byte-compatible with Python, goldened by the 33 test_codex_ask_* pytest tests (now run in CI via codex-ci.yml). Files: plugins/codex/{go.mod,main,dispatch,detach,registry,status}.go + helpers_test.go + .golangci.yml; .goreleaser.yaml (dir: plugins/codex, pure-Go cask); codex-release.yml (v* tag → verify plugins/codex plugin.json → release-go.yml@v1); codex-ci.yml (macos-latest). Python bin/codex-ask DELETED. Two source-text goldens rewritten vs Go source; fixture builds at <tmp>/codex/bin/codex-ask + copies AGENTS.md so os.Executable() resolution is exercised.

Review found + fixed 8 faithfulness/robustness divergences (all Python-grounded): AGENTS.md fail-closed (no fallback), streaming reads (bufio, not whole-file), symlink lanes (os.Stat not DirEntry.IsDir), exec errno mirrors execvp/subprocess (ENOENT→127 incl bad-interpreter, else 126; skip non-exec PATH entries), CRLF meta splitLines, question-read error propagation, worker-log-before-spawn, resolveCandidate first-executable-not-first-existing. golangci uncapped 74→0 (errcheck _=, gosec nolint keeping Python's exact 0o755/0o644 modes, staticcheck predicate extract).

DEFERRED to Phase F (not misses): install-binary.sh cc-guides fragment + SKILL.md/plugin.json PATH-provisioning + plugin version bump 0.20.0→1.0.0 + align codex-release.yml verify-plugin-version comment (slop-cop resolves TAG from releases/latest, not plugin.json). Release archive names (verified via goreleaser --snapshot): codex-ask_darwin_{amd64,arm64} (+ .tar.gz + cask); download URL https://github.com/yasyf/cc-skills/releases/download/${TAG}/codex-ask_darwin_${arch} — the install-binary.sh must match byte-for-byte.

CONSTRAINT: codex (gpt-5.6) is OUT OF QUOTA until ~2026-07-26 21:19 — all review/impl lanes rerouted to opus this session. Remaining: B (cc-interact consumer daemon/hooks/channel/greeting/direct), C (async await-primary/relay-fallback flow), D+E (top-level Monitor path + guard hook + #78782 upstream), F (design review + live matrix + ship 1.0.0).
